languages.text: "Дело в том, что зенитным орудиям не требуется починка. Ошибка, нарушившая механизмы самонаведения, была внесена в сетку навигации с помощью базовых кодов доступа, вероятность случайности минимальна. Логический расчет приводит к неутешительному выводу: внутри штаба находится персона, саботирующая священные машины".

"The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."
languages.original_text: "Дело в том, что зенитным орудиям не требуется починка. languages.text: “问题在于，防空炮组并不需要维修。致使导引机制失灵的错误，是通过基础访问代码被植入导航网格的，此事为意外的可能性极低。逻辑推演得出的结论令人失望：指挥部内部有人在蓄意破坏神圣机械。”
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: “问题在于，防空炮组并不需要维修。致使导引机制失灵的错误，是通过基础访问代码被植入导航网格的，此事为意外的可能性极低。逻辑推演得出的结论令人失望：指挥部内部有人在蓄意破坏神圣机械。”

languages.text: « Il se trouve que la batterie de défense antiaérienne n'a pas besoin de réparations. L'erreur qui perturbait les mécanismes de guidage avait été introduite dans la matrice de navigation par le biais de codes d'accès basiques, ce qui signifie qu'il est peu probable qu'il s'agisse d'un accident. Les calculs logiques aboutissent à une conclusion décevante : il y a un individu dans le quartier général qui sabote les machines sacrées. »
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: « Il se trouve que la batterie de défense antiaérienne n'a pas besoin de réparations. L'erreur qui perturbait les mécanismes de guidage avait été introduite dans la matrice de navigation par le biais de codes d'accès basiques, ce qui signifie qu'il est peu probable qu'il s'agisse d'un accident. Les calculs logiques aboutissent à une conclusion décevante : il y a un individu dans le quartier général qui sabote les machines sacrées. »

languages.text: "Hava savunma bataryasının onarıma ihtiyacı olmadığı tespit edilmiştir. Kılavuz mekanizmaları sekteye uğratan hata, gezinme şebekesine temel erişim kodları kullanılarak yerleştirilmiştir. Bu durumun kaza olma olasılığı ise çok düşüktür. Mantıksal hesaplamalara göre hayal kırıklığı yaratan bir sonuç ortaya çıkmakta: Karargâhta kutsal makineleri sabote eden bir şahıs bulunuyor."
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: "Hava savunma bataryasının onarıma ihtiyacı olmadığı tespit edilmiştir. Kılavuz mekanizmaları sekteye uğratan hata, gezinme şebekesine temel erişim kodları kullanılarak yerleştirilmiştir. Bu durumun kaza olma olasılığı ise çok düşüktür. Mantıksal hesaplamalara göre hayal kırıklığı yaratan bir sonuç ortaya çıkmakta: Karargâhta kutsal makineleri sabote eden bir şahıs bulunuyor."

languages.text: «La realidad es que la batería antiaérea no necesita reparaciones. El error que interfirió con los mecanismos de guía se introdujo en el panel de navegación mediante códigos de acceso básicos; la probabilidad de que esto sea un accidente es mínima. El cálculo lógico conduce a una conclusión decepcionante: un individuo en este cuartel general está saboteando las máquinas sagradas».
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: «La realidad es que la batería antiaérea no necesita reparaciones. El error que interfirió con los mecanismos de guía se introdujo en el panel de navegación mediante códigos de acceso básicos; la probabilidad de que esto sea un accidente es mínima. El cálculo lógico conduce a una conclusión decepcionante: un individuo en este cuartel general está saboteando las máquinas sagradas».

languages.text: "Der Punkt ist, dass die Flugabwehrbatterie keiner Reparatur bedarf. Der Fehler, der die Lenkmechanismen störte, wurde über Zugangscodes in die Navigationsmatrix eingeschleppt. Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass es sich dabei um ein Versehen handelte, ist minimal. Logische Berechnungen legen eine enttäuschende Schlussfolgerung nahe: Es gibt im Hauptquartier jemanden, der die heiligen Maschinen sabotiert."
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: "Der Punkt ist, dass die Flugabwehrbatterie keiner Reparatur bedarf. Der Fehler, der die Lenkmechanismen störte, wurde über Zugangscodes in die Navigationsmatrix eingeschleppt. Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass es sich dabei um ein Versehen handelte, ist minimal. Logische Berechnungen legen eine enttäuschende Schlussfolgerung nahe: Es gibt im Hauptquartier jemanden, der die heiligen Maschinen sabotiert."

languages.text: 「防空砲は修理の必要がない。誘導機構を妨害したエラーは、基本アクセスコードを用いてナビゲーショングリッドに導入された。事故の可能性は極めて低い。論理的な計算は、残念な結論に導く。本部内に、神聖なる機械を破壊しようとする者がいる。」
languages.original_text: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."

traits.locale_text: 「防空砲は修理の必要がない。誘導機構を妨害したエラーは、基本アクセスコードを用いてナビゲーショングリッドに導入された。事故の可能性は極めて低い。論理的な計算は、残念な結論に導く。本部内に、神聖なる機械を破壊しようとする者がいる。」
